tools.name: wechat_get_hot_search_list
tools.description: 获取微信视频号热榜；当前不支持翻页。

tools.name: wechat_get_user_info_by_user_id
tools.description: 根据微信视频号用户 ID 获取用户信息。

tools.name: wechat_get_user_posted_videos_by_user_id
tools.description: 根据微信视频号用户 ID 获取用户发布视频列表，支持 page_token 翻页。

tools.name: wechat_get_user_posted_videos_by_url
tools.description: 根据微信视频号视频链接或分享文案中包含的视频链接，解析作者后获取用户发布视频列表。

tools.name: wechat_get_video_comment_replies_by_comment_id
tools.description: 根据微信视频号一级评论 ID 获取评论回复。

tools.name: wechat_get_video_comments_by_object_id
tools.description: 根据微信视频号详情返回的 object_id 和 object_nonce_id 获取评论列表。

tools.name: wechat_get_video_comments_by_url
tools.description: 根据微信视频号视频链接或包含链接的分享文案获取评论列表。

tools.name: wechat_get_video_detail_by_encrypted_object_id
tools.description: 根据微信视频号搜索结果返回的 encrypted_object_id 获取视频详情。

tools.name: wechat_get_mp_article_detail_by_url
tools.description: 根据微信公众号文章链接或包含链接的分享文案获取文章详情和正文。

tools.name: wechat_get_video_detail_by_url
tools.description: 根据微信视频号视频链接或包含链接的分享文案获取视频详情。

tools.name: wechat_submit_video_speech_text_by_video_url
tools.description: 提交微信视频号视频口播转文字任务；提交完成后最多短等 210 秒，未完成时返回 job_id 和下一步查询动作。

tools.name: wechat_submit_video_speech_text_by_encrypted_object_id
tools.description: 根据微信视频号 encrypted_object_id 提交视频口播转文字任务；提交完成后最多短等 210 秒，未完成时返回 job_id 和下一步查询动作。

tools.name: wechat_get_video_speech_text_job
tools.description: 查询微信视频号口播转文字任务状态；可选长轮询当前 job，不触发重处理。

tools.name: wechat_search_videos
tools.description: 搜索微信视频号视频，返回视频列表和下一页分页令牌。

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: wechat_get_user_posted_videos_by_url, wechat_get_video_comment_replies_by_comment_id, wechat_get_video_comments_by_object_id, wechat_get_video_comments_by_url, wechat_get_mp_article_detail_by_url, wechat_get_video_detail_by_url · Public sink: wechat_submit_video_speech_text_by_video_url, wechat_submit_video_speech_text_by_encrypted_object_id.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: wechat_get_user_posted_videos_by_url, wechat_get_video_comment_replies_by_comment_id, wechat_get_video_comments_by_object_id, wechat_get_video_comments_by_url, wechat_get_mp_article_detail_by_url, wechat_get_video_detail_by_url · Public sink: wechat_submit_video_speech_text_by_video_url, wechat_submit_video_speech_text_by_encrypted_object_id

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
